_comment: hpc-agent safety policy — committed to the repo. Editor / dream-mode / sandbox config lives in settings.local.json (gitignored). The split keeps destructive-op denials traceable in git history while letting per-developer ergonomics drift independently.

hooks.command: read input; file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then ruff_out=$(ruff check "$file" 2>&1); ruff_rc=$?; mypy_out=$(mypy "$file" --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1); mypy_rc=$?; if [ $ruff_rc -ne 0 ] || [ $mypy_rc -ne 0 ]; then echo '❌ Lint/type errors — fix before proceeding:'; [ $ruff_rc -ne 0 ] && echo "--- ruff ---" && echo "$ruff_out"; [ $mypy_rc -ne 0 ] && echo "--- mypy ---" && echo "$mypy_out"; exit 1; fi; fi
